---
title: "Career Strategy"
---

## Overview

This section maps individual skill gaps identified in the Skill Gap Analysis to concrete career development actions for each team member.

## Career Path Targets

| Team Member | Target Role |
|-------------|-------------|
| Julie | Data Analyst / Business Intelligence |
| Yifan | TBD |
| Zhiyang | TBD |
| Alina | TBD |
| Antara | Data Engineer / Analytics |

## Action Plan Framework

For each team member:

1. Priority skills based on gap vs. industry expectation
2. Recommended resources: courses, certifications, projects
3. Timeline: short-term (1-3 months) vs. long-term (6-12 months)

## Status

To be completed after skill gap ratings are finalized by all team members.
